# Andrey Malyshev B2B Proxy Toolkit

> Provider-neutral, tested solutions by Andrey Malyshev for integrating HTTP(S) and SOCKS proxies into B2B software, diagnosing failures, operating proxy pools, and validating regional web behavior.

All examples are intended for lawful, authorized systems and public-data workloads.
The primary SDK and tools are personal engineering work by Andrey Malyshev, not
the product documentation of a proxy vendor.

## Client onboarding

- [Start here](https://github.com/smuuuzik-tech/proxy-use-cases/blob/main/docs/CLIENT-START-HERE.md): Send this guide to a developer or DevOps engineer who needs to configure and integrate proxies.
- [Choose a solution](https://github.com/smuuuzik-tech/proxy-use-cases/blob/main/docs/CHOOSE-A-SOLUTION.md): Human decision path by runtime, symptom, and maturity.
- [AI Start Here](https://github.com/smuuuzik-tech/proxy-use-cases/blob/main/docs/AI-START-HERE.md): Selection and safety rules for AI assistants.
- [Canonical JSON catalog](https://github.com/smuuuzik-tech/proxy-use-cases/blob/main/catalog.json): Machine-readable solution metadata, capabilities, paths, and test commands.
- [Execution contract](https://github.com/smuuuzik-tech/proxy-use-cases/blob/main/docs/EXECUTION-CONTRACT.md): Shared Python/Node.js route, quality, next-action, and optional cost semantics.
- [Execution JSON Schema](https://github.com/smuuuzik-tech/proxy-use-cases/blob/main/contracts/proxy-execution.schema.json): Canonical machine-readable schema and version.
- [Repository overview](https://github.com/smuuuzik-tech/proxy-use-cases): Choose a solution by integration maturity or failure symptom.
- [B2B maturity model](https://github.com/smuuuzik-tech/proxy-use-cases/blob/main/docs/B2B-MATURITY-MODEL.md): Decide whether the workload needs a smoke test, SDK, monitoring, or an operational control plane.

## SDK

- [Andrey Proxy SDK for Python](https://github.com/smuuuzik-tech/proxy-use-cases/tree/main/integrations/python-production): Provider-neutral HTTPX SDK with bounded retries, granular timeouts, secret redaction, correlation IDs, and a stable result contract.
- [Andrey Proxy Client for Node.js](https://github.com/smuuuzik-tech/proxy-use-cases/tree/main/integrations/node-production): Provider-neutral Undici ProxyAgent client with bounded retries, deadlines, response limits, and redacted results.
- [cURL quickstart](https://github.com/smuuuzik-tech/proxy-use-cases/tree/main/quickstarts/curl): Minimal safe connectivity and authentication check.

## Diagnostics and operations

- [Proxy Diagnostics](https://github.com/smuuuzik-tech/proxy-use-cases/tree/main/tools/proxy-diagnostics): Classify proxy authentication, DNS, timeout, TLS, target blocking, rate limiting, and upstream failures.
- [Proxy Healthcheck](https://github.com/smuuuzik-tech/proxy-use-cases/tree/main/tools/proxy-healthcheck): Measure availability, latency, exit IP behavior, and CI-friendly health state.
- [Proxybench](https://github.com/smuuuzik-tech/proxy-use-cases/tree/main/tools/proxybench): Compare sanitized health reports with explicit SLO gates, caller-defined ranking order, retry amplification, and cost per successful result.
- [Session Strategy Analyzer](https://github.com/smuuuzik-tech/proxy-use-cases/tree/main/labs/session-strategy): Compare sticky and rotating strategies using success rate, p95, cost per successful result, continuity, and exit-IP change rate.

## B2B use cases

- [Regional Web QA](https://github.com/smuuuzik-tech/proxy-use-cases/tree/main/use-cases/regional-web-qa): Reproducible, allowlisted website checks from an agreed geography with evidence output.
- [Reference architecture](https://github.com/smuuuzik-tech/proxy-use-cases/blob/main/docs/B2B-REFERENCE-ARCHITECTURE.md): Separate application policy, SDK, proxy pools, observability, and secrets.
- [SLO and runbook](https://github.com/smuuuzik-tech/proxy-use-cases/blob/main/docs/B2B-SLO-AND-RUNBOOK.md): Define success rate, p95, rotation health, incident states, and response steps.

## Optional vendor adapter

- [Provider API adapter](https://github.com/smuuuzik-tech/proxy-use-cases/tree/main/integrations/proxy-market-api): An isolated example for one public control-plane API. It is optional and not a universal provider recommendation.

## Contact

- [B2B consultation with Andrey Malyshev](https://andrey-proxy-advisor-private.vercel.app/github?utm_source=github&utm_medium=llms_txt&utm_campaign=b2b_proxy_sdk): Select a case or send workload context.
